metrics.name: academorix.webhook.deliveries.total
metrics.description: Every WebhookDelivery row created. state at terminal transition.

metrics.name: academorix.webhook.deliveries.duration_ms
metrics.description: outcome: delivered / failedRetryable / failedPermanent. End-to-end HTTP round-trip.

metrics.name: academorix.webhook.deliveries.retries_total
metrics.description: Retry attempts beyond the first. Correlates with receiver health.

metrics.name: academorix.webhook.subscriptions.active_gauge
metrics.description: Count of active subscriptions per tenant + destination. Sampled every 30s.

metrics.name: academorix.webhook.subscriptions.disabled_total
metrics.description: reason: gone_410 / failure_threshold / manual / api_version_sunset / tenant_suspended.

metrics.name: academorix.webhook.subscriptions.rate_limit_deferred_total
metrics.description: Deliveries deferred because per-subscription rate limit reached.

metrics.name: academorix.webhook.dispatch.batch_size
metrics.description: Bus::batch size when fanning out an event. Tracks fan-out intensity.

metrics.name: academorix.webhook.signing.rotations_total
metrics.description: Secret rotations. Sudden spikes indicate compromise remediation.

metrics.name: academorix.webhook.signing.rotation_grace_hits_total
metrics.description: Deliveries that used the previous secret (X-Webhook-Signature-Previous). Non-zero during rotation grace — zero after grace expires.

metrics.name: academorix.webhook.inbound.received_total
metrics.description: Inbound webhook receipts by namespace + provider.

metrics.name: academorix.webhook.inbound.signature_invalid_total
metrics.description: Inbound webhooks rejected by verify.webhook. Anomalously high = potential replay / brute-force attempt.

metrics.name: academorix.webhook.probe.failures_total
metrics.description: Consecutive probe failures per subscription. Feeds WebhookProbeFailed event.
